summary: The implementation comprehensively addresses all 13 requirements from the BuildRequest. All backend CRUD operations, data models, reporting methods, and CSV export functionality are implemented in Motoko. The frontend implements all required forms, tables, reports, and export functionality using React with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS. Time calculations handle edge cases including midnight crossover. All entity references are validated through backend lookups and resolved to display names instead of IDs throughout the UI.

hallucinated_features.reason: The implementation includes useInternetIdentity hook and InternetIdentityProvider components for user authentication. However, the BuildRequest explicitly lists 'Multi-tenant or user authentication beyond Internet Identity' as a non-goal, suggesting Internet Identity itself may not have been requested.
The CSS files include extensive dark mode styling with .dark class variants. No requirement requested dark mode or theme switching functionality.

The implementation uses a tabbed interface (Tabs component) to organize flight entry, logs, reports, and export sections. While all these features were requested, the specific UI pattern of tabs was not specified in the requirements.
